svg.title: Edeon Desktop workflow view
svg.desc: Workflow-centered UI mockup for the Edeon desktop application showing the Resistance-Aware Lead Optimization workflow running on a Glyphosate analogs project. The interface includes: top header with logo, project breadcrumb, run controls, and account; left sidebar with Projects, Views (Library, Workflows active, Knowledge, Models, Reports), and Recent workflows; main area with workflow header, six-stage pipeline visualization showing three complete stages and one running stage, and a results table with sortable columns and color-coded risk badges; right inspector panel showing the selected compound's structure, key properties, selectivity profile across four organisms, resistance metrics, and action buttons; bottom status bar showing active jobs, memory usage, and license status.
svg.text: 3 of 6 stages complete · 247 compounds active · started 8 min ago
Showing 1-12 of 247 · sorted by composite score
